description: Standalone editor schema for a Buckety whose backend resolves to the kadm driver. kadm is deliberately not in a driver family (families are per service kind); GENERALIZE to buckety for no parameter constraints.

adoption.description:
What happens when the resolved backend resource
already exists at first reconcile. AdoptEmpty (the
default) adopts only content-free resources; Adopt
claims a resource with pre-existing content.
Adopted resources are never deleted from the
backend, whatever retentionPolicy says. See SPEC.md
section "Adoption".

backend.description:
Name of a backend defined in the controller's config
file. Immutable after creation.

defaultAccess.description:
Single-consumer shortcut. Materialises an implicit
BucketyAccess of the same name; reclaimed via
owner-ref when an explicit BucketyAccess arrives or
this field is removed. See SPEC.md.

name.description:
Optional name template. Resolved once at first
reconcile and frozen in status.backendResourceName.
Defaults to metadata.name if omitted. See SPEC.md
section "Naming templates" for the grammar.

parameters.description: Schema for Buckety.spec.parameters when the resolved driver is kadm. Driver-known keys are listed under properties; pass-through Kafka topic configs match patternProperties.

^config\\.[a-z][a-z0-9._]*$.description: Pass-through Kafka topic config (e.g. config.retention.ms, config.cleanup.policy, config.compression.type). Backend's own validation catches typos. Drivers document which keys are immutable broker-side.

partitions.description: Partition count. Omit to use broker default (CreateTopics replication=-1 + broker default). Can grow but not shrink; an attempted shrink surfaces ParameterDrift.

replicationFactor.description: Replication factor. Omit (or set -1) to use broker default.replication.factor.

parameters.title: kadm driver Buckety parameters

retentionPolicy.description:
What happens to the backend resource when this
Buckety is deleted.

backendResourceName.description: Resolved name template. Sticky from first reconcile.

driverBuildVersion.description:
Full SemVer of the binary that most recently
reconciled this resource. Informational.

driverMajor.description:
Sticky. Gates driver-version compatibility. See
SPEC.md "Driver versioning".

provenance.description:
Created when the controller made the backend
resource, Adopted when it claimed a pre-existing
one. Sticky. Absent on resources stamped before
adoption tracking existed. DeleteBuckety only runs
for Created; see SPEC.md section "Adoption".

title: Buckety (kadm)
